subcodes.first_line: This is a Tablet that speaketh with truth, and wherein is that which guideth humanity unto God, the Mighty, the All-Praised, Who hath ordained for us [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: هذا لوح ینطق بالحق و فیه ما یهدی الناس الی الله العزیز الحمید الذی قدر لنا
subcodes.subjects: @teaching the Cause; call to teach, @proclamation to Muslims, @power and sovereignty of God; omnipotence of God, @suffering and imprisonment
